scripts.test: pnpm --filter @mirai/shared build && pnpm --filter @mirai/croo build && pnpm build && node --test 'dist/**/*.test.js'
scripts.test:unit: pnpm --filter @mirai/shared build && pnpm --filter @mirai/croo build && pnpm build && node --test 'dist/**/*.unit.test.js'
scripts.test:integration: pnpm --filter @mirai/shared build && pnpm --filter @mirai/croo build && pnpm build && node --test 'dist/**/*.integration.test.js'
scripts.test:api: pnpm --filter @mirai/shared build && pnpm --filter @mirai/croo build && pnpm build && node --test 'dist/**/*.api.test.js'
scripts.test:e2e: pnpm --filter @mirai/shared build && pnpm --filter @mirai/croo build && pnpm build && node --test 'dist/**/*.e2e.test.js'
scripts.test:e2e:real-a2a: pnpm --filter @mirai/shared build && pnpm --filter @mirai/croo build && pnpm build && node scripts/real-creative-a2a-e2e.mjs
